bullets: Architected a Python and FastAPI microservice on AWS handling 12M requests/day, cutting p95 latency by 38%.
Led a monolith migration to Kubernetes with Terraform-managed infrastructure as code, reducing deployment time from 45 minutes to 6 minutes.
Built a Kafka event pipeline feeding Snowflake, enabling real-time analytics for 200+ internal users.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries and Redis caching, saving an estimated $90k/year in compute costs.
Mentored 4 engineers and introduced CI/CD (continuous integration and continuous delivery) quality gates, reducing production incidents by 25%.
Implemented a Django REST API and integrated Stripe billing while maintaining 99.9% uptime.
Expanded automated test coverage from 40% to 85% across the core service.

projects.title: OpenMetrics Dashboard
bullets: Built an open-source observability dashboard adopted by the community with 1.2k GitHub stars.
Implemented a Go collector exporting 60+ Prometheus metrics with less than 2% overhead.

projects.title: ResumeForge
bullets: Built a deterministic Python and FastAPI JSON-to-LaTeX resume generator with ATS-aware formatting.
Automated one-page document fitting through a compiler loop using pdflatex.

summary: Prioritized direct evidence of Python, FastAPI, AWS microservices, Kubernetes, Terraform, Kafka, Snowflake, PostgreSQL, and Redis experience. Reordered and trimmed skills and older-role content for a faster backend-focused scan while preserving all employers, titles, dates, and metrics. Kept Go and Docker visible through the OpenMetrics project and applied no bolding as requested.
